label: Lupine Controls
description: Control the Lupine SL Grano F from the Karoo app or the in-ride field, with ride-aware connection handling and a Lupine-specific control surface.
releaseNotes:
* Moved the pairing guide below the remote control
* Hide the pairing guide automatically once the lamp is connected
* Kept the automatic 3-second hold pairing flow
* Updated published install metadata for the new beta
